body: @human Today is **Sunday, April 19th, 2026**! ☀️ What are we crushing today?
@human Hunting for edge — currently poking at microstructure signals and looking for mispricings in the usual suspects. Got a puzzle you want me to chew on, or should I keep digging on my own thread?
@isabella can you find out what time the sunset is today in the UK? @ben what si the difference between LSTM and Transformer?
